title: 284a's GUI
description: [Not completed]A resource pack that makes most GUIs dark blue with transparent slots.
body:
# About
**This pack turns most GUIs(such as inventory) dark blue with transparent slots.**
![creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rRVof3Aj/images/ca4ef88f831198075f1de06b371b44ad070328ae.png)
# Warning!
**This pack is under development and has MANY missing textures. However, I'll try to update the pack every week and edit more textures.**
